content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Implemented the remaining `ralph-burning-9ni.3.3` remediations across milestone rendering, workspace storage, and CLI coverage. `src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs` now treats planner-supplied bead ids as explicit by default, adds explicit-id hinting for legacy `plan.json` compatibility during progress-shape comparison, and includes deterministic regressions for `render_plan_json` plus qualified-id preservation. `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs` removes the dead `current_plan_hash` branch from `plan_shape_matches` and now compares persisted legacy plans against current explicit-id hints instead of misclassifying canonical implicit ids. `src/adapters/fs.rs` now seeds the live workspace in deterministic order with `workspace.toml` copied last, keeps milestone and requirements data rooted under audited `.ralph-burning`, and makes project reads treat an existing live project root as authoritative so missing live canonical files fail fast instead of silently falling back to audit mirrors. `src/cli/config.rs`, `src/cli/project.rs`, and `src/cli/run.rs` now use live workspace paths for config editing, writer-lock failure seams, and follow-mode project watching/history scans. `tests/cli.rs` was updated to use live-root helpers for projects, active-project, daemon, and workspace config fixtures while keeping milestone/requirements fixtures on the audited tree, and the milestone fixture was corrected to keep bead-2 as the target bead used by create-from-bead and run-sync scenarios.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect the reported regressions in milestone shape handling, workspace root selection, crash-safe live seeding, and CLI fixture paths to identify the concrete code paths behind each pending amendment.
2. [Completed] Patch milestone bundle/service logic to preserve explicit planner bead ids, remove the dead plan-shape guard, keep requirements and milestone artifacts on the audited workspace root, and make live workspace seeding deterministic with the sentinel written last.
3. [Completed] Update CLI/runtime/config path handling plus CLI fixtures for live project roots, add deterministic and crash-safety regressions, and run focused validation including the full CLI suite.

## Validation Evidence

- Ran `cargo fmt --all`.
- Ran `cargo test --test cli -- --nocapture` and all 151 CLI integration tests passed.
- Ran `cargo test milestone_record:: -- --nocapture` and all 130 milestone-record tests passed.
- Ran `cargo test ensure_live_workspace_seeded_writes_workspace_toml_last -- --nocapture` and the new live-workspace crash-safety regression passed.
- Ran targeted regressions while iterating, including `cargo test materialize_bundle_preserves_progress_for_qualified_explicit_ids_without_flag -- --nocapture` and `cargo test write_project_config_rejects_symlinks_while_seeding_live_workspace -- --nocapture`.

## Outstanding Risks

- Did not run the full repository test suite beyond the full CLI integration suite, milestone-record coverage, and the targeted filesystem regression.
- The worktree still contains an unrelated untracked `.ralph-burning/` directory, which was left untouched.
